name: Bridge Ministry Corporate Cake
description: Vanilla sponge cake base with smooth white buttercream frosting and a custom edible logo print for The Bridge Ministry.

name: Paw Patrol Pink Birthday Cake
description: 1kg Vanilla sponge cake with pink and white buttercream swirls, featuring Paw Patrol edible character prints and paw-print decals.

name: 1kg Sofia Themed Cake
description: 1kg Vanilla sponge cake with purple and white buttercream, decorated with Sofia the First character toppers, 3D butterflies, and purple sugar pearls.

name: Floral Red & Yellow Rose Cake
description: Spiced vanilla sponge cake with white buttercream frosting, topped with fresh red and yellow roses, baby's breath, and a gold 'Happy Birthday' topper.

name: Blue & White Ruffled Anniversary Cake
description: Blueberry sponge cake with hand-piped blue and white buttercream ruffles, accented with gold leaf and 'Mum & Dad' gold lettering.

name: Ernest Butterfly Birthday Cake
description: Mint green and white buttercream cake base decorated with multi-colored butterfly toppers and custom green frosting lettering.

name: Ngumi Blue Striped Birthday Cake
description: Vanilla sponge cake with horizontal blue buttercream stripes, gold splatter effects, and black hand-piped birthday message.

name: Israel 1/2 Birthday Cloud Cake
description: Dome-shaped fondant cake with vanilla sponge, sky-blue sugar paste covering, handcrafted fondant clouds, and hot air balloon motifs.
